MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Ritz Apartments, is present. Represented by Mike Mickhamish
Attorney, Edward Singer, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, David Stoops and William Roderick, are present.
Attorney, Jaime Rush, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JAN-03-2010 is vacated.
